title: View Kanban columns isolated
excerpt: Please create a feature in the Kanban view that opens a column when you click on the header as if it was an item, so you can view the full list of items per column, or at least you are able to expand the number of items …

posts.author: Sflores (Susana Flores)
posts.cookedHtml: Please create a feature in the Kanban view that opens a column when you click on the header as if it was an item, so you can view the full list of items per column, or at least you are able to expand the number of items you can see in a column without having to scroll down.
